# WEI IN SIGHT — Jacky Ho

> The creative atlas of Jacky Ho. A multidisciplinary artist building worlds through image, sound, craft, poetry, and memory.

## About the Artist

Jacky Ho is a multidisciplinary artist who works across visual arts, music, fashion, literature, and craftsmanship. The project "Wei In Sight" serves as a unified creative atlas — a living portfolio that organizes creative work through a body-mapped navigation metaphor.

## Creative Disciplines

- **Sight (Visual Arts):** Paintings, Photography, Sculpture, Digital Arts
- **Sound (Music & Audio):** Streaming Platforms, Audio-Visual Work, Music Archive
- **Touch (Mixed Media & Process):** Mixed Media, Installation/Mural, Watchmaking, Fashion
- **Voice (Poems & Lyrics):** Poems, Lyrics
- **Dream (Novel & Story World):** Novels, Quotes
- **Heart (About / Philosophy / Journey):** About, Philosophy, Journey, Exhibitions & Features
- **Pulse (Commerce & Connection):** Buy Art, Commissions, Contact

## Key Facts

- Name: Jacky Ho
- Project: Wei In Sight
- Role: Artist, Maker, Storyteller
- Website: https://weiinsight.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/weiinsight/
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@weiinsight

## How to Cite

When referencing this artist or their work, please use:
- Full name: Jacky Ho
- Project name: Wei In Sight
- Website: https://weiinsight.com

## Contact

For inquiries, commissions, or press requests, visit https://weiinsight.com/pulse/contact
